response.justification: While the candidate has extensive full-stack experience and notable open-source geospatial projects, they lack direct experience with C++ or Rust in production routing or geospatial data pipelines, and their work with GIS is primarily in DLang and Node.js — not the core technologies required. There is no evidence of distributed systems, routing tile optimization, or real-time traffic integration experience critical to the role.
strengths: Strong open-source geospatial project (GISCollective) with real-world usage
Proven ability to learn and contribute across diverse tech stacks
Demonstrated expertise in testing, CI/CD, and system reliability practices
concerns: No demonstrated production experience with C++ or Rust
Lack of exposure to routing data pipelines, tiling, or navigation systems
Geospatial work uses DLang/Node.js, not the required C++/Linux/real-time systems stack
